blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Holy.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተወልደ እማርያም እምቅድስት ድንግል ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ ከቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም የተወለደ፣ አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: God, Holy Mighty, Holy Living Immortal, who was born from the holy Virgin Mary, have mercy upon us, Lord.
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér, qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'eeyimewit zetewelde iMariam imqidist dingil tesahalene igzee'o.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተጠምቀ በዮርዳኖስ ወተሰቅለ ዲበ ዕፀ መስቀል። ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ።
blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ በዮርዳኖስ የተጠመቀ፣ በመስቀል ላይ የተሰቀለ አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Living Immortal, who was baptized in Jordan and crucified on the tree of the cross, have mercy upon us, Lord.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus Igzee'abiher qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'iymewit zeteTemqe beYordanos weteseqle deebe itSe mesqel tesahalene igzio.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተንሥአ እሙታን አመ ሣልስት ዕለት ዐርገ በስብሐት ውስተ ሰማያት ወነበረ በየማነ አቡሁ ዳግመ ይመጽእ በስብሐት ይኰንን ሕያዋነ ወሙታነ ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ።
blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ በሦስተኛው ቀን ከሙታን ተለይቶ የተነሣ፣ በክብር በምስጋና ወደ ሰማይ የወጣ፣ በአባቱ ቀኝ የተቀመጠ፣ በሕያዋንና በሙታን ይፈርድ ዘንድ ዳግመኛ በጌትነት ይመጣል አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Living Immortal, who did rise from the dead on the third day, ascended into heaven in glory, and sits at the right hand of the Father, and wilt come again in glory to judge the quick and the dead, have mercy upon us, Lord.
blocks.transliteration: qidus Igzee'abihér qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'eeyimewit zetensi'a imutan ame salist ilet, arge besibihat wiste semayat wenebere beyemane abuhu, dagime yimets'i besibhat yikwonin hiyawane wemutane tesahalene igzee'o.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ስብሐት ለአብ ስብሐት ለወልድ ስብሐት ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ
blocks.amharic: ለአብ ምስጋና ለወልድ ምስጋና፣ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ምስጋና
blocks.english: Glory be to the Father, glory be to the Son, glory be to the Holy Spirit,
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat le'Ab sibhat leWeld sibhat leMenfes Qidus

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን ወአሜን ለይኩን፣ ለይኩን።
blocks.amharic: ዛሬም፣ ዘወትርም ለዘለዓለም እውነት በእውነት ይሁን፣ ይሁን።
blocks.english: both now and ever and world without end. Amen and Amen, so be it, so be it.
blocks.transliteration: Yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'alem alem amen we'amen leyikun leyikun.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: በሦስትነት ያለህ ቅዱስ ሕያው እግዚአብሔር ሆይ! ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: O Holy Trinity, living God have mercy upon us.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Glory be to God.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.

O Lord, maker of all, invisible God, we stretch out our soul to Thee and we offer morning prayer unto Thee. O Lord, the powerful wisdom of all, God merciful maker of the soul, we glorify Thee, begotten from the Father beyond the creation of the world; Thou, Who art the only Word and rests in Thy saints, art praised by the archangels with ceaseless glories. Thou was not made by hands but art creator of the hidden things, Thou art the invisible, pure, and holy, and the announcer Who told us the wisdom of Thy hidden glory. Thou made us to hope for the unquenchable light; and we, Thy servants, offer unto Thee glory, thanksgiving and holiness ; and the people glorify Thee.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Oh Lord, we glorify Thee.

O God of light, Thou art the source of life, the head of knowledge, the giver of grace from the perfect grace, the maker of the soul, giver of good, giver of the Holy Spirit, the treasure of wisdom, the helper, the teacher of saints, the foundation of the world, who accepts the prayer of the holy ones. We glorify thee, O only-begotten Son, the first-born Word of the Father, Thou has granted Thy universal grace to us who call upon Thee. O pure and blameless Father, with Thee are the treasures which moth and rust do not corrupt, and of which Thou gives to them who trust upon Thee in all their thoughts. Thou made the angels desire to visit the light which was before the world, and Thou art our unchangeable guardian. Through Thy Father’s pleasure Thou has enlightened us, we who had valued darkness, we whom Thou has brought from darkness into light, granted us life after death, and freedom from slavery. By Thy cross Thou has brought us nearer to Thy Father in heaven. By the Gospel Thou has led us, and by the prophets Thou has comforted us, we whom Thou has brought near, O God. O God, give us light. We praise Thee, O our God, that with ceaseless thanksgiving we may say that we are Thy servants; and the people praise Thee.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Oh Lord, we praise Thee.

O Jesus, the Son of God, Who is above all, we offer three fold thanksgiving unto Thee with Thy Father, in Thine eternal kingdom, and all the creatures glorify Thee in trembling and fear of soul. And all the souls of the righteous trust in Thee, Thou Who quieted the stormy floods of the evil spirits for our sake, and Who became for us life from destruction, and a refuge where there is the hope of eternal salvation. Thou saves those who are troubled on the sea, through Thy grace Thou heals those who are in the wilderness, Thou accompanies those whose imprisonment is very hard ; so free us from the bond of death. Thou comforts the miserable and the weeping, Thou saves the weak with Thy cross, it is Thou Who takes away and removes all the wrath from us who have trusted in Thee. O Lord, Whom the prophets and the apostles thanked secretly, we thank Thee. We glorify Thee, so that, believing in Thee and fulfilling Thy will, we may rest in the abode of life. Grant us to walk according to Thine order. O Lord, through Thy mercy visit all, small and great, rulers and people, shepherd and flock, for Thine is the kingdom, O blessed Lord our God. Glory be to the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit, as before the creation of the cosmos, so both now and ever, and from generation to endless generations, and ages without end.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The grace of God be with you.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: And with Thy spirit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Let us glorify our God.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Strengthen the thought of your heart.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ብነ ኀበ እግዚአብሔር አቡነ ዘበሰማያት፣ አቡነ ዘበሰማያት፣
blocks.amharic: በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ አለን። አባታችን ሆይ! አባታችን ሆይ!
blocks.english: We lift them unto the Lord our God. Our Father who art in heaven, Our Father who art in heaven,
blocks.transliteration: Bine habe Igzee'abihér abune zebesemayat, abune zebesemayat,

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: አቡነ ዘበሰማያት ኢታብአነ እግዚኦ ውስተ መንሱት።
blocks.amharic: አባታችን ሆይ! አቤቱ ወደ ፈተና አታግባን።
blocks.english: Our Father who art in heaven, lead us not into temptation.
blocks.transliteration: Abune zebesemayat, eetabi'ane igzee'o wiste mensut.

blocks.english: O God the Father, giver of light, the power of all, visitor of all souls, light which was before, creator of the world, the leader of life and giver of immortal happiness, Thou has taken us out of the snares of darkness, and granted us the inestimable light. Thou has loosed us, we who believe in Thee, and covered us with faith. Thou art not far from Thy servants, but rather, Thou art always with them. Thou does not neglect the soul which begs Thee with fear and trembling. Thou knows all before the thought, and examines all before the thought. Through Thy will Thou supplies our needs before we ask; Thou hears us who call upon Thee without doubting. Thou art the inestimable light, and the King of the heavenly hosts, hearer of the glorious song of the archangels upon whom Thou rests. O Lord, we pray Thee to hear us. Grant us the unceasing word in trust. We glorify Thee, we thank Thee, and we bless Thee; O Lord, we, Thy servants, glorify Thee because we depend upon Thee.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Oh Lord, we glorify Thee.

O Lord, Jesus Christ, holy, Thou has heard us. Thou became a word to the dumb, a staff to the broken ones, light to the blind, a way to the lame, and the purifier of the lepers. O Lord, Thou did heal the sick and cure the deaf. Thou rebuked death and destroyed the darkness. Thou created the light of the sun which does not set, the unquenchable light, the Sun which always shines over the holy ones, Thou established all through Thy fixed will for the decoration of the world. Thou appeared clearly to all to save man, Thou art the restorer of the soul, and Thou was beforehand in determining all things rightly. O Thou, Creator of angels, Father of all, the adornment of the world and the maker of earth, Wisdom and Knowledge were sent to the world by the everlasting Father. This existence is unchangeable and immeasurable and invisible spirit. Thou art the glorious announcer and Thy name is wonderful. For this reason we, Thy servants, praise Thee, O Lord.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Oh Lord, we praise Thee.

We offer this three-fold holy glory unto Thee, Who has given us Thine unchangeable faith, enabling us to break the bonds of death. Thou created the upright minds of those who believe in Thee, that they may be called gods among men. Thou has granted us to tread down all the powers of the enemy through the Spirit, so that we may loosen that which could not be loosened. Thou has made effectual for us love towards Thy Father and made reconciliation between us and Him. O Lord, hear those who beg Thee. O Lord, let not us, who petition Thee fall into sin, but vindicate us against our enemies, our accusers. Grant us continuous prayer that we may be kept from being swallowed up by the enemy. O eternal King, hear: comfort the widows, accept the orphans, purify the unclean through Thy mercy, grant wisdom to the foolish, restore the lost, save the prisoners, and be a refuge to all of us, for Thine is the blessed kingdom, O Lord our God.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Amen.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: The grace of God be with you.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: And with Thy spirit.

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.english: Give ye thanks unto Our God.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.

O immortal Father, Saviour of our soul, the foundation of wisdom, keeper of our hearts, Thou has granted light to our inward eyes and covered us with Thy knowledge against the darkness of our mind. By the cross of Thine Only-begotten, Thou did save the first man, who was given to destruction, and did renew him by the immortal things. Iniquities vanished at Thy command, and Thou made redemption through the death of Thy Son, even as He searched for the lost one. For this reason we, Thy servants, glorify Thee, O Lord.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: We glorify Thee, O Lord.

We praise Thee, O Lord, with glorious song, Thou, Whom the archangels glorify, always, unceasingly and without rest. Whom also, the lords praise singing with the praise of glory and thanksgiving. O Lord, Thou has sent Thy counsel, Word, Wisdom, and Thy visitation, Who was with Thee before the cosmos began, without being created, that is the Word Who was not created, Thy beloved Son, Who appeared in flesh for mankind’s salvation.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: We praise Thee, O Lord.

From our heart we offer to Thee three fold praise, O Lord, giver of life. Thou visited the soul of the humble and despised not the troubled soul. Thou accepted the persecuted and helped them, Thou saved those in difficulty. Thou thought of the hungry and avenged the victims of sin. Thou art the friend of the faithful, speaker to the righteous, dwelling place for the pure ; Thou hears those who call upon Thee in righteousness, protects the widow, saves the orphan, grants right leadership to the Church which Thou has made a dwelling-place of the glorious faith, the council of the Spirit, the giver of grace and power. While we praise Thee without rest, we confess in our hearts Thy kingdom which was declared unto us by Thee and Thy beloved Son, our Lord Jesus, through Whom be glory and dominion to Thee, unto the ages of ages.
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.english: Amen.
